title: BEM-1193 runtime validator
objective:
Create file governance/validators/validate_live_runtime_receipt.py with content import json
from pathlib import Path

CONTRACT = Path("governance/runtime/BEM1192_RUNTIME_PROOF_CAPTURE_CONTRACT.json")


def validate(path):
    contract = json.loads(CONTRACT.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    receipt = json.loads(Path(path).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    errors = []
    for field in contract.get("required_runtime_receipt_fields", []):
        if field not in receipt:
            errors.append(f"missing field {field}")
    required_values = contract.get("required_values", {})
    for key, expected in required_values.items():
        if receipt.get(key) != expected:
            errors.append(f"{key} must be {expected!r}")
    text = json.dumps(receipt, ensure_ascii=False).lower()
    for forbidden in contract.get("forbidden", []):
        if forbidden.lower() in text:
            errors.append(f"forbidden token found: {forbidden}")
    return errors

if __name__ == "__main__":
    import sys
    if len(sys.argv) != 2:
        print("usage: validate_live_runtime_receipt.py <receipt.json>")
        raise SystemExit(2)
    errs = validate(sys.argv[1])
    if errs:
        print("FAIL")
        for err in errs:
            print(err)
        raise SystemExit(1)
    print("PASS live_runtime_receipt")
